title: Implement #2162 bounded pre-study lane

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement all acceptance criteria in parent #2162 and child slices #2163 and #2164.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep pre-study optional, bounded, provider-agnostic, freshness-bound, and non-authoritative after Planning consumption; preserve Planning custody and product-edit gates.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Locate existing startup, external-intent, Planning-shape, continuation, session-log, and skill packet builders and design the smallest integrated contract.
proof_expectations: Focused startup, next-safe-action, external-intent, Planning, continuation, and session-log tests.
#2143 unknown-to-lane replay plus clear-task and apparent-uncertainty comparison fixtures.
make test-workspace and make lint-workspace before completion claim.
touched_scope: .agentic-workspace/skills/** and package payload mirrors when routed
docs/maintainer/** or narrow dogfooding evidence surfaces
completion_criteria: #2162, #2163, and #2164 acceptance criteria are implemented and demonstrated without a parallel durable truth source.

goal: Add bounded evidence-triggered work-shape pre-study before shape-specific Planning mutation.
Measure when study lowers total completion cost and preserve an explicit zero-study route.
Compile disposable study evidence into canonical Planning and continuation state without rereading.
non_goals: Do not make pre-study mandatory or keyword/complexity driven.
Do not capture hidden reasoning, full research transcripts, or create a second authoritative Planning artefact.
Do not broaden into unrelated #1969 state-delta work beyond reuse required by #2164.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement all issues under the #2162 lane
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Complete #2162 and its open child slices #2163 and #2164 as one governed lane.

intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Workspace runtime/reporting/external-intent/planning integration, focused tests and fixtures, shipped operating skills/payload mirrors, and narrow maintainer evidence docs.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Prefer <= 30 implementation/test/docs files; stop and re-scope if the change crosses unrelated package ownership.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: Changed-path AW proof selection, focused tests, #2143 replay/comparison evidence, make test-workspace, and make lint-workspace.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Archived slice is complete; reopen only if closeout evidence is invalidated.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Inspect the existing compact packet and external-intent routes, then implement the smallest shared work-shape study contract.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
validation_commands: uv run pytest <focused affected test files> -q
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --target . --changed <paths> --task "Implement all issues under the #2162 lane" --format json
completion_criteria: Startup distinguishes Planning custody from known artefact shape and blocks shape-specific mutation while shape-changing evidence is missing.
Study output supports skip, sufficient, ambiguous, unavailable/stale, no-change, needs-human-decision, and blocked outcomes with bounded probes and freshness.
Lane/decomposition evidence selects the lane route before regular execplan creation, including a #2143 replay.
Comparative evidence covers clear skip, shape-changing study, and apparent uncertainty without broadening, with costs and savings separated.
Study state seeds Planning/continuation, becomes stale safely, and is retired after consumption; mixed-agent continuation avoids rereading.
Focused and full routed proof pass, and closeout separately confirms intent, issue coverage, residue, and dogfooding findings.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented evidence-triggered work-shape study routing, explicit lane and ambiguity decisions, disposable continuation seed state, comparative completion-cost evidence, and shipped operating-loop guidance for #2162-#2164.
execution_run.scope touched: Workspace startup/planning routing, reporting/continuation packets, operating-loop skill mirrors, focused CLI tests, and checked-in Planning lane state.
execution_run.changed surfaces: workspace runtime modules, reporting_support, operating-loop skill/payload mirror, CLI tests, Planning lane/execplan
execution_run.next step: promote the next bounded slice from GitHub #2165

finished_run_review.scope respected: All three issue acceptance boundaries are covered by runtime behavior and tests. Host-agnostic agent judgment is preserved: activation uses structured evidence state and enums, not task-title or repo-specific keyword routing. Ordinary test additions answer precedence, replay, ambiguity, skip, and mixed-agent continuation trust questions; no existing evidence was removed.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes for slice; parent remains open via GitHub #2165
